'''Brine Eyes-Li''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] [[Assassin|hitman]] from [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]] who served the [[RavinsBlud Crime Syndicate]] and [[Sebolto]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], Brine was the originator of the bounty on the head of [[Meen Burtak]]. The [[Pixelito Grand Council]] posted a bounty on Li himself, 5000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] alive, 2500 dead, that was collected by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
